# AskDoGood Week 1 Email Blast Playbook

This is the recommended send strategy for the current list.

## Why this strategy

Because this list appears older, the safest high-performance path is:
1. Re-introduction and reconfirmation first
2. Value-first second
3. Offer third

This protects sender reputation while still driving sales.

## Confirmed list stats

- Source file: wp-members-user-export-2025-01-06.csv
- Valid emails: 1510
- Invalid emails: 0
- Duplicate groups: 0

## Platform plan

- Bulk sends: Beehiiv (primary)
- High-touch follow-up replies and warm leads: askdogood@gmail.com

## Day-by-day schedule

- Day 1: Email 1 (Re-intro + stay-on-list CTA)
- Day 3: Email 2 (Practical value + free resource CTA)
- Day 5: Email 3 (Primary paid offer CTA)
- Day 6-7: Follow-up to clickers/non-buyers with short personal notes from askdogood@gmail.com

## Email 1 (Re-introduction)

Subject options:
- AskDoGood is back with practical healing support
- If you are still on a healing journey, this is for you
- A quick re-introduction from RoSee at AskDoGood

Body:
Hi,

I am RoSee from AskDoGood.

If you are navigating health challenges and want practical support for real life, you are in the right place.

AskDoGood is about holistic healing and structure, including support around thyroid health, blood pressure, blood sugar, gut recovery, brain fog, food discipline, and rebuilding routines that actually stick.

My standard is simple:
Eat to live, never live to eat.

If you want to keep getting practical guidance, click here:
https://askdogood.com/free-meal-plan?utm_source=beehiiv&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=week1_reintro&utm_content=confirm_interest

If this is no longer for you, you can unsubscribe at any time.

With care,
RoSee
AskDoGood

## Email 2 (Value-first)

Subject options:
- 5 practical moves for better energy this week
- Start here if your body feels overloaded
- The no-fluff reset I use in real life

Body:
Hi,

If your body feels overloaded, start simple this week:

1. Hydrate before caffeine
2. Build one anti-inflammatory plate daily
3. Walk 15 to 20 minutes after meals
4. Cut one trigger food for 7 days and track response
5. Protect sleep as a non-negotiable

Healing is not about perfection. It is about consistency.

Here is a free practical plan to help you start:
https://askdogood.com/free-meal-plan?utm_source=beehiiv&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=week1_value&utm_content=free_plan

With you in the process,
RoSee

## Email 3 (Offer)

Subject options:
- Ready for full structure? Start here
- If you want a complete system, this is for you
- My step-by-step course is now available

Body:
Hi,

If you are ready for full structure, I created a practical course that walks through what to do next.

Thyroid Health Mastery is built from lived experience and real implementation, not theory.

If this is your season to stop guessing and move with clarity, you can start here:
https://askdogood.gumroad.com/l/thyroid-health-mastery?utm_source=beehiiv&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=week1_offer&utm_content=primary_cta

No pressure, just direction when you are ready.

RoSee
AskDoGood

## Follow-up script for askdogood@gmail.com replies

Use for people who clicked but did not purchase:

Subject:
Quick check-in from AskDoGood

Body:
Hi [First Name],

I saw you checked out the program. If you want, reply with your biggest challenge right now (energy, labs, food discipline, stress, gut, blood pressure, blood sugar, or brain fog), and I will point you to the best starting step.

Rooting for you,
RoSee

## Gmail setup (how to do it)

If you want automation-compatible Gmail sending:
1. Log into askdogood@gmail.com
2. Go to Google Account -> Security
3. Turn on 2-Step Verification
4. Search App Passwords in Security
5. Create app password for Mail (or custom name like AskDoGood Blast)
6. Copy the 16-character password and store it in your password manager

Important:
- Do not place this password in git files.
- Use this only in secure tools or connector secret fields.

## Beehiiv execution checklist

1. Import cleaned CSV: askdogood-subscribers-cleaned-2026-04-27.csv
2. Use publication ID: pub_82c2e68c-a3f8-4fa4-a7fd-29bf9355e4c1
3. Create Week1 segment: Imported_2025_reintro
4. Schedule Email 1, 2, 3 on the day cadence above
5. Monitor after each send:
- Open rate
- Click rate
- Unsubscribe rate
- Bounce rate

## Pause/scale rules

Pause and adjust if:
- Unsubscribe rate > 1.0%
- Hard bounce rate > 2.0%

Scale to full cadence if:
- Open rate >= 25%
- Click rate >= 2.0%
- Unsubscribe <= 0.6%
